questionHtml: Calculate the pH of 0.00100 mol dm–3 propanoic acid solution. Use section 21 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
Ka = 10−4.87 / 1.35 × 10−5 ✔

[H+] = «1.35×10-5×0.001=1.35×10-8=» 1.16 × 10−4 «mol dm−3» ✔

pH = 3.94 ✔


Accept alternative methods of calculation.

Award [3] for correct final answer.

Award [3] for 3.96 {answer if solved by quadratic}.

meta.title: Calculate the pH of 0.00100 mol dm–3 propanoic acid solution. Use section 21 of the data booklet.
